items.title: Estonia and Latvia say territories hit by stray Ukrainian drones
items.dek: The incidents occurred on the same night that Ukraine launched a massive attack on Russia's port of Ust-Luga, near the Estonian border.
items.body: The incidents occurred on the same night that Ukraine launched a massive attack on Russia's port of Ust-Luga, near the Estonian border.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: 'There's no safety anymore': Palestinians warn of expanding West Bank settler violence
items.dek: There has been a surge of attacks by Israeli settlers on Palestinian villages across the occupied territory since the start of the Iran war.
items.body: There has been a surge of attacks by Israeli settlers on Palestinian villages across the occupied territory since the start of the Iran war.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Talk show host Stephen Colbert to write new Lord of the Rings film
items.dek: Colbert, who is a Tolkien superfan, will adapt an early section of the first Lord of the Rings novel.
items.body: Colbert, who is a Tolkien superfan, will adapt an early section of the first Lord of the Rings novel.
